dashboard.overview: Welcome back to your financial overview
dashboard.noExpenseData: No expense data for this month

app.experience_future: Experience the future of personal accounting with ClariFi. We turn complex data into simple, beautiful insights that empower your financial freedom.

transactions.start_journey: Your financial journey starts with your first entry.

balanced.desc: You are just starting your journey. Keep tracking to discover your financial DNA.
balanced.advice: Start by logging every small expense to get a clear picture.

saver.desc: You prioritize security and future growth. Your discipline is your greatest asset.
saver.advice: Consider investing some of your savings to beat inflation.

impulse.desc: You live in the moment! While life is for enjoying, your future self might need a hand.
impulse.advice: Try the 24-hour rule: wait a day before any non-essential purchase.

spender.desc: You are currently living beyond your means. It is time for some clarity.
spender.advice: Review your fixed costs and see where you can trim the fat.

strategist.desc: You have a calculated approach to money. You know where every cent goes.
strategist.advice: Keep optimizing your budget categories for even better efficiency.

recap.title: Financial Recap
recap.share_not_supported: Image sharing is not supported on this browser. The image has been downloaded instead.
recap.share_text: Check out my {{period}} recap on ClariFi! Visit clarifi-gamma.vercel.app
recap.vibe_balanced_desc: You kept things steady and predictable.
recap.vibe_nomad_desc: Your passport saw more action than your savings account!
recap.vibe_explorer_desc: You literally ate your way through the period. Delicious!
recap.vibe_trendsetter_desc: Retail therapy was your primary form of self-care.
recap.vibe_architect_desc: You're building an empire, one saved dollar at a time.

about.title: About ClariFi
about.subtitle: Intelligent Wealth Management
about.description: ClariFi is more than just a tracker. It's your financial co-pilot, designed to turn complex data into simple, beautiful insights.
about.mission_desc: We believe that financial management shouldn't be a chore. ClariFi was built to bridge the gap between complex banking tools and intuitive, engaging experiences.

features.ai_desc: Smart analysis of your spending habits using advanced Gemini AI models.
features.game_desc: Turn savings into quests. Earn XP, build streaks, and level up your finances.
features.privacy_desc: Your data is yours. Securely stored and encrypted with Firebase.

about.passion_desc: ClariFi is a labor of love, combining the latest in web technology with a deep understanding of personal finance.
